title: Robust Smoky Tunisian Fish Tagine
description: A spicy and flavorful Tunisian dish featuring flaky fish, yellow onion, and a blend of aromatic spices, quickly prepared in a smoky tagine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or a large skillet with a tight-fitting lid over medium heat.
Add the sliced yellow onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is softened and lightly browned.
Stir in the smoked paprika, ground cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the white fish fillets to the tagine, spooning some of the onion and spice mixture over the top of each fillet.
Cover the tagine and cook, undisturbed, for 12 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and lemon juice.
Serve the fish and onion mixture hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
